statement: The operator reviewed and explicitly authorized merging the repaired Lab PR #110 content at exact head 26499623f288c28108ab51471d3115b08f884b29. The repaired content separates substantive promotion scope from the exact current-PR merge-authorization bookkeeping path while preserving independent Human merge authorization. This authorization permits only merge-authorization bookkeeping after the authorized content commit.
non_claims: This authorization covers only the exact repaired content head 26499623f288c28108ab51471d3115b08f884b29; any later substantive change requires new operator authorization.
This does not certify the PR content is correct, safe, secure, private, or complete.
This does not authorize any change outside operations/merge_authorizations/ after the authorized substantive commit.
This does not authorize any other pull request, branch, repository, setting, deletion, promotion, dependency change, or Hermes action.
